title: Agent Message Latency
objective: Send a real message through OpenClaw's CLI agent path, verify an assistant response is produced, and measure full turn latency, provider routing, gateway health, memory, and logs.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before wiring the model provider and sending a message.

phases.title: Run Local Agent Turn
phases.intent: Use OpenClaw's real local embedded agent CLI command and require a JSON assistant response.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-message-latency --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Post-Agent Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the agent turn and capture provider/plugin diagnostics.
